title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 246.310 - Inapplicability of certain law regarding abeyance of water and sewer assessments
text:
246.310.  Inapplicability of certain law regarding abeyance of water and sewer assessments. — The provisions of section 262.802 shall not apply to any drainage district or levee district formed under and pursuant to the laws of this state.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1316 merged with H.B. 1692, et al. merged with S.B. 795)
